description: Retrieve all reactions (likes or recasts) on a specific cast in the Farcaster network. The cast is identified by its creator's FID and unique hash. This endpoint helps track engagement metrics and user interactions with specific content.

parameters.name: target_fid
parameters.description: The FID of the cast's creator. Required to uniquely identify the cast that received the reactions. Must be used in conjunction with target_hash.

parameters.name: target_hash
parameters.description: The unique hash identifier of the cast that received the reactions. This is a 40-character hexadecimal string prefixed with '0x' that uniquely identifies the cast within the creator's posts. Must be used with target_fid.
